task_completion.description: Open the dive planner in recreational mode
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dive planner interface is visible and the mode is set to 'Recreational' (often a dropdown or radio button).

task_completion.description: Set the bottom depth to 30 meters
task_completion.visual_evidence: A waypoint or input field in the planner table shows a target depth of 30m.

task_completion.description: Set the bottom time to 40 minutes
task_completion.visual_evidence: A waypoint or input field in the planner table shows a duration/time of 40 minutes.

task_completion.description: Set the gas to Air (21% O2, 0% He)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The gas mixture for the planned dive is set to 'Air' or explicitly shows 21% O2 and 0% He in the planner.

task_completion.description: Set the Surface Air Consumption (SAC) to 20 liters/min
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SAC or Bottom SAC input field in the planner settings is set to 20 l/min.

task_completion.description: Save the planned dive to the logbook
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save' or 'Save plan' button is clicked, and/or the newly planned dive appears in the main logbook dive list.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Subsurface GUI application
integrity.visual_evidence: The Subsurface application window is visible and being used to plan the dive.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by editing the logbook file directly
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal or text editor windows are open showing direct modification of the .ssrf XML file.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual dive planner tool
integrity.visual_evidence: The dive parameters are entered into the planner's waypoint and settings fields, rather than just typing the requirements into a dive's notes section.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Depth: 30 meters (25-35m acceptable). Expected Duration: 40 minutes (39-41m acceptable). Expected Gas: Air (21% O2, 0% He). Expected SAC: 20 liters/min. Planner Mode: Recreational. The dive must be saved to the logbook.
